basic_details.short_information: The latest J&K Development Finance Corporation Ltd. (JKDFC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Manager (Legal) posts! Published on the official JKDFC website, this recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 50 years of age and possessing a Graduate degree in Law (LLB) can apply offline on or before 19 June 2026. Find all details about the JKDFC Manager (Legal) vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application process, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 50 years as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as permitted in GOI Guidelines.

qualification.details: Regular full-time Degree in Law (LLB - 3 years) with 50% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University. Degree in a 5-year integrated course in Law from a recognized University with 50% marks or equivalent CGPA. Fifteen (15) years of post-qualification executive experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JKDFC Manager (Legal) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jkdfc.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
